episodes.title: Massimo's Tagliatelle
episodes.description: Osteria Francescana's Massimo Bottura traces the single dish that defined his philosophy.

episodes.title: Elena's Mole
episodes.description: A four-day mole negro from Oaxaca — the dish Elena Reyes has been perfecting for thirty years.

episodes.title: The Stock
episodes.description: Robuchon's original kitchen team reconstructs the foundational stock from memory and notes.

episodes.title: Fermentation
episodes.description: Chef Rene Redzepi's foraging and fermentation approach to Nordic ingredients.

episodes.title: The Whole Animal
episodes.description: Fergus Henderson on nose-to-tail cooking and why nothing should be wasted.

episodes.title: Simplicity
episodes.description: Italian-American chef Marcella Hazan's daughter recreates her mother's legendary tomato sauce.

episodes.title: The Sushi Counter
episodes.description: Master sushi chef Jiro Ono's apprenticeship system — twenty years to earn a station.

episodes.title: BBQ Nation
episodes.description: Pitmaster Aaron Franklin traces American barbecue from the 18th century to competition circuits.

episodes.title: Spice Architecture
episodes.description: Indian chef Manish Mehrotra on building layered spice profiles in modern Indian cuisine.

episodes.title: The Sauce
episodes.description: Three French sauciers debate whether classical sauce technique has a future.

episodes.title: Fish & Time
episodes.description: Nobu Matsuhisa on aging fish — the controversial technique that divides traditionalists.

episodes.title: Bread
episodes.description: Poilâne bakery's legacy loaf — the same sourdough recipe, baked in the same oven, for 70 years.

extras.title: Full Recipe Cards
extras.description: Printed adaptations of each featured dish for home cooks.

extras.title: The Kitchens
extras.description: Architectural profiles of each restaurant featured in the series.
